positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for monkeypox_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    fever != tiredness).

cnf(u13,axiom,
    tiredness != coughing).

cnf(u23,negated_conjecture,
    ~symptom_of_monkeypox(coughing)).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    symptom_of_monkeypox(tiredness)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    fever != headache).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    headache != coughing).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    muscle_pains != tiredness).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    muscle_pains != coughing).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    fever != coughing).

cnf(u9,axiom,
    symptom_of_monkeypox(fever)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    headache != muscle_pains).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    headache != tiredness).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    symptom_of_monkeypox(muscle_pains)).

cnf(u10,axiom,
    symptom_of_monkeypox(headache)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    fever != muscle_pains).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for monkeypox_neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    headache != muscle_pains).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    fever != headache).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    fever != muscle_pains).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    muscle_pains != coughing).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    fever != coughing).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    tiredness != coughing).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    headache != coughing).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    headache != tiredness).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    muscle_pains != tiredness).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    fever != tiredness).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define symptom_of_monkeypox(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
